_comment: Power weight (0-5) per effect / condition / defense, used by power-search to score how strong a power/perk/skill is by the effects it delivers. SEEDED WITH GUESSES — correct them. 0 = irrelevant/weak, 5 = game-warping. The search sums weights of the effect-ish entities each ability mentions (REFS.mentions), times a tier multiplier (cantrips are weak), times an accent-availability penalty (effects gated behind rare accents are less practical).

tierMultiplier._comment: Multiplies a power's effect-score by its tier. Cantrips are weak despite being spammable; higher tiers hit harder. Tune freely.

accentRarity._comment: Penalty multiplier when a power's text invokes this accent — rare/gated accents (Divine needs a devotion; Arcane/Void are uncommon) make the effect less practical. 1 = common/no penalty, lower = rarer.
